_instructions: Hand-written before any extraction tool was run. Each later extraction is diff'd against this contract; mismatches are objective failures, not 'looks close'. Per Gemini's audit on 2026-05-08, this removes the developer-as-judge bias.

verbatim.title: Sell Your Painting Quickly & Safely | PieterKoopt®
h2: Selling your painting? It starts here
Selling a painting? Pieter arranges it.
verbatim.value_prop_lede: Looking to sell your painting? At PieterKoopt®, we offer a quick, personal, and hassle-free selling experience - no fees, transparent offers within 48 hours.

behaviours_observed: site-header — sticky, background fades in past 50px scroll
hero — sticky cards stack with -3deg / +2deg / -1deg rotations, hover translateY(-4px)
bottom-hero — radial gradient overlay, no animation
site-footer — hover underline on all anchor links
pricing_or_pricing_policy: No commission fees; you receive 100% of the offer.
framework_signature_visible_in_html: Webflow (cdn.prod.website-files.com, w-* class prefixes, data-fc-* attrs)
_notes: Distinctive: the index-card aesthetic in the hero (rotated, layered, cream-on-olive) and the dark band classical-painting bottom hero are the visual identity hooks. Any rebuild that doesn't preserve those two motifs is structurally not pieterkoopt.
